prompts.prompt: Editorial portrait captured on a Sony α1 II (Full-Frame sensor) paired with the Sony FE 135mm f/1.8 GM. Aperture f/1.4, ISO 200, shutter 1/250s. Razor-thin depth of field with razor-thin subject separation; round bokeh balls in the background. Color profile natural skin, soft window light lighting with warm highlights and neutral shadows. Skin tones rendered with a natural cast, contrast curve soft S-curve, saturation natural, fine film grain. 4K 10-bit, 3:2, single-point AF. No plastic skin, no oversharpening, no HDR look.
